se-controls.blurb: Icomply designs, installs and maintains SE Controls AOV and smoke ventilation systems for multi-storey residential and commercial buildings across the North West. Our engineers commission actuators, OS2 panels and SHEV interfaces to BS 9991 and EN 12101, then back every job with planned service visits and full certification. Trade customers can also order SE Controls spares and install kits from our Stockport shop for rapid turnaround on Greater Manchester sites.

siedle.blurb: Icomply supplies and fits Siedle intercom and door communication systems for apartments, offices and high-spec residential schemes throughout Greater Manchester and the wider North West. From classic audio stations to IP video door entry, we handle survey, install, programming and ongoing service so FM teams keep every entrance working. Certification-ready handover packs and trade spares from our shop keep Siedle estates reliable year-round.

siemens.blurb: Icomply installs and services Siemens electrical distribution equipment for commercial, industrial and multi-dwelling properties across the North West. Our NICEIC-aligned team works to BS 7671 on consumer units, distribution boards, breakers and protection devices, with full testing and certification on every job. Landlords, contractors and FM teams can buy Siemens trade spares and install accessories from our Stockport base for same-week site support.

simon-rwa.blurb: Icomply is a North West installer and service partner for Simon RWA smoke and heat exhaust ventilation systems on residential towers, care settings and commercial blocks. We commission AOVs, roof vents and control equipment to EN 12101 and BS 9991, then schedule planned maintenance with clear certification records for freeholders and managing agents. Trade actuator and panel kits from our shop keep Simon RWA sites compliant between full service visits.
